name: Cream of Lentil Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried lentils in 6 cups of water overnight. Drain them before cooking.
2. Place the soaked lentils, chopped onion, minced garlic, chopped carrot, and chopped celery into the crockpot.
3. Add 3 cups of water to the pot.
4. Cover the crockpot and cook on LOW setting for 8 to 10 hours.
5. Stir in the heavy cream, then season with salt and pepper to taste.
